Kidplokio 2pk Green Sonic Space Blaster Toy Lights and Sounds Boys Ages 3 and Up

Defenders of our solar system and unknown galaxies beyond, your little ones are busy fighting evil galactic villains and rogue galaxy agents—after dinner and homework of course! To keep their pretend play sessions running at top speed, they’ll need the 2pc Kidplokio Sonic Space Blaster Toys with flashing, colorful lights, and fast-paced blasting sound effects to ensure victory and a safe journey home.

Let’s not forget about the fast-action trigger (this is where the action happens!); upon release of the trigger, the space soldier toy blaster sets off an awesome display of colorful, flashing lights in conjunction with wild blasting firing sounds, that makes saving the galaxy even more fun! The toys come with batteries, so superhero action can start right out of the box! No screwdrivers, batteries, or other tools are required.

Key Features

  • 2PC SPACE BLASTER TOY SET - As defenders of our solar system and unknown galaxies beyond, kids will need the Kidplokio Sonic Space Blaster Toy Set to keep pretend play space missions running at top speed! Featuring flashing colorful lights and awesome blasting sound effects, aliens and evil galactic villains won’t stand a chance!
  • COOL LIGHTS AND SOUNDS - This is where the action happens! Upon the release of the trigger, the Kidplokio interactive toy blaster features bright lights and wild blasting sounds for the ultimate in intergalactic fighting fun!
  • INTERGALACTIC PRETEND PLAY - A great toy set to get kids off the couch and reduce screen time from cell phones and computers, the sonic blaster toys are action-packed, boasting some seriously cool pretend play fighting features that will have kids up on their feet in search of the next alien invasion or cross galaxy mission
  • NO ASSEMBLY NEEDED - The sonic space blaster toy comes assembled with batteries included, so the superhero action can start right out of the box! No screwdrivers, batteries, or other tools are required to get this toy going
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Blasters included: 2; Dimensions: 10” x 6” x 1.5”; Weight: .75lbs; Color: green; Warning: choking hazard, small parts (recommended age 3+ years); Batteries included: yes

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KPLSGGRN2PK
  • UPC: 810131315665
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 2pc

A great toy set to get your kids off the couch and reduce screen time away from cell phones and computers, the toy blasters are action-packed, boasting some seriously cool pretend play fighting features that will have kids up on their feet in search of the next intergalactic battle. Whether it’s an alien invasion or a space mission to a galaxy far, far away, kids will have a blast indoors or outside with this super fun Kidplokio Space Blaster Galaxy Toy Blaster Set. Made from durable plastic construction to withstand hours of pretend play, the toy space soldier galaxy blaster is lightweight and easy for kids to operate.

Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts)

Recommended Ages: 3+
